module.name: graph
module.description: A graph / plot image with optional x-axis and y-axis labels (params) and an optional caption (a second body section) — each independent and optional, rendered with Markdown + KaTeX. Image, label and caption sizes are configurable.
module.aiSpec: Wrap a graph / plot / figure IMAGE with optional axis labels and a caption. Block module. The FIRST body section is the image (ordinary markdown, e.g. `![](plot.png)` or an `![](@alias)` library reference). An OPTIONAL caption is a SECOND body section after a `<!-- @ -->` separator (so it can be long and contain commas — Markdown + $KaTeX$). The axis labels are params (also Markdown + $KaTeX$, each optional): - `xlabel` — centred UNDER the image (the horizontal axis). - `ylabel` — to the LEFT of the image, rotated 90° (the vertical axis). Sizes (all optional CSS lengths): `imagesize` (image width — e.g. `400px`, `30em`, or a `%` of the slide like `70%`; blank = natural size), `labelsize` (axis-label font size), `captionsize` (caption font size). Quote any LABEL value that contains a comma. Example: `<!-- @graph ylabel: "$y$ [m]", xlabel: "$t$ [s]" -->` then `![](traj.png)` then `<!-- @ -->` then `Fig. 1: trajectory, with $g = 9.8$.` then `<!-- @end -->`.

param.name: xlabel
param.label: X-axis label
param.desc: Centred under the image (horizontal axis). Markdown + $KaTeX$. Blank = none. Quote it if it contains a comma.

param.name: ylabel
param.label: Y-axis label
param.desc: Left of the image, rotated (vertical axis). Markdown + $KaTeX$. Blank = none. Quote it if it contains a comma.

param.name: imagesize
param.label: Image size
param.desc: Image width: a CSS length (e.g. 400px, 30em) or a % of the slide (e.g. 70%). Blank = natural size.

param.name: labelsize
param.label: Label size
param.desc: Font size of the axis labels (CSS length, e.g. 1.1em, 18px).

param.name: captionsize
param.label: Caption size
param.desc: Font size of the caption (CSS length, e.g. 0.85em, 14px).

snippet.label: Graph — axis labels + caption
snippet.description: A graph image with x/y axis labels and a caption (second section; Markdown + KaTeX).

snippet.label: Graph — sized, x-axis only
snippet.description: A graph at 70% of the slide width with only an x-axis label.
